---
title: "About"
---

Hi, I'm Maitreya. I love to write deep technical dives on how modern ML systems actually work - tensors and training fundamentals, LLM inference internals, and beyond - built from first principles with code, math, and real benchmarks.

Reach out: [maitreyasuin21@gmail.com](mailto:maitreyasuin21@gmail.com) · [GitHub](https://github.com/maitreyasuin)
